# Fix It Jerry

> Fix It Jerry is a device repair shop in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia with four branches
> (Desa Parkcity, Subang Jaya, Bukit Jalil, Puchong). We repair smartphones, tablets,
> laptops, Nintendo Switch, AirPods, and Apple Watches with transparent MYR pricing.
> Repairs start from RM 80 with most screen and battery replacements completed same-day.
>
> Brands serviced: Apple (iPhone, iPad, MacBook, Apple Watch, AirPods), Samsung, Google Pixel,
> Huawei, Xiaomi, OPPO, Vivo, OnePlus, Lenovo, Asus, Acer, Dell, HP, Nintendo Switch.
>
> Repair types: Screen replacement, battery replacement, charging port repair, water damage
> recovery, data recovery, RAM/SSD upgrade, GPU repair, motherboard repair, software issues.

## Core Pages
- [Homepage](https://fixitjerry.com/): Overview of services, locations, and pricing range (RM 80–1,200).
- [Contact & Locations](https://fixitjerry.com/contact): Full addresses, per-branch contacts, and operating hours.
- [Book a Repair](https://fixitjerry.com/book-a-repair): Online booking form.

## Repair Guides
- [Phone Won't Turn On](https://fixitjerry.com/guides/phone-wont-turn-on): Diagnostic steps and repair costs.
- [Phone Not Charging](https://fixitjerry.com/guides/phone-not-charging): Causes and fix options.
- [Screen Black But Phone Is On](https://fixitjerry.com/guides/screen-black-but-phone-is-on): Diagnosis guide.
- [Laptop Not Turning On](https://fixitjerry.com/guides/laptop-not-turning-on): Step-by-step diagnosis.
- [iPhone Battery Replacement Cost](https://fixitjerry.com/guides/iphone-battery-replacement-cost-malaysia): Malaysia pricing guide.
- [Samsung Screen Replacement Cost](https://fixitjerry.com/guides/samsung-screen-replacement-cost-malaysia): AMOLED pricing guide.
- [Water Damage Repair Cost](https://fixitjerry.com/guides/water-damage-repair-cost-malaysia): Immediate action steps and costs.
- [MacBook Screen Repair Cost](https://fixitjerry.com/guides/macbook-screen-repair-cost-malaysia): Retina display replacement guide.
- [Charging Port Repair Cost](https://fixitjerry.com/guides/charging-port-repair-cost-malaysia): Symptoms, costs, and turnaround.
- [Phone Data Recovery Cost](https://fixitjerry.com/guides/phone-data-recovery-cost-malaysia): Mobile and laptop data recovery guide.
- [Power IC Repair Cost](https://fixitjerry.com/guides/power-ic-repair-cost-malaysia): Smartphone, tablet and laptop pricing.
- [iPad Screen Repair Cost](https://fixitjerry.com/guides/ipad-screen-repair-cost-malaysia): All iPad models pricing.
- [Apple Watch Battery Replacement Cost](https://fixitjerry.com/guides/apple-watch-battery-replacement-cost-malaysia): Series pricing guide.
- [Nintendo Switch Battery Replacement Cost](https://fixitjerry.com/guides/nintendo-switch-battery-replacement-cost-malaysia): Pricing guide.
- [AirPods Battery Replacement Cost](https://fixitjerry.com/guides/airpods-battery-replacement-cost-malaysia): All AirPods models.

## Device Services
- [iPhone Repairs](https://fixitjerry.com/iphone): All iPhone models and service types.
- [Samsung Repairs](https://fixitjerry.com/samsung): All Samsung Galaxy models.
- [MacBook Repairs](https://fixitjerry.com/macbook): Screen, battery, and board-level repairs.
- [iPad Repairs](https://fixitjerry.com/ipad): All iPad models and service types.
- [Google Pixel Repairs](https://fixitjerry.com/pixel): All Pixel models and service types.
- [Nintendo Switch Repairs](https://fixitjerry.com/devices/nintendo-switch): Battery, fan, and screen repairs.
- [AirPods Repairs](https://fixitjerry.com/devices/airpods): Battery and audio repairs.
- [Apple Watch Repairs](https://fixitjerry.com/devices/apple-watch): Screen and battery repairs.

- [Full Sitemap](https://fixitjerry.com/sitemap.xml): Complete index of all device/brand/model/service pages.
